breakout_stance.label: constructive_bullish
breakout_stance.thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

catalysts.point: The next 1 to 4 weeks matter most around whether price can keep holding above 11.40 and attract follow-through volume.

recent_weakness.point: No clearly negative stock-specific or market-overlay headline was captured in the local cache, so recent weakness may have been driven more by market tape than by a fresh identifiable shock.

recovery_signals.point: Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (11.40), a basic breakout confirmation signal.
Volume anomaly is strong at 3.93, which supports the move.
Price is above EMA20, EMA50, EMA200, which keeps the medium-term trend supportive.
The feed already classifies the name as ENTRY_READY rather than a lower-conviction candidate.

risks.point: A close back below 11.40 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture.
